name: 02_columns_source_ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7
statement:
SELECT
  'source' AS table_family,
  'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7' AS catalog_name,
  table_schema AS schema_name,
  table_name,
  column_name,
  data_type,
  ordinal_position
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7`.information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema = 'dbo'
ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position
